org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.util

Class OctoQuadFWv3.EncoderDataBlock

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.util.OctoQuadFWv3.EncoderDataBlock
  • Enclosing class:
    OctoQuadFWv3

    public static class OctoQuadFWv3.EncoderDataBlock
extends java.lang.Object
    A data block holding all encoder data; this block may be bulk read in one I2C operation. Check isDataValid() before using the data.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      boolean crcOk
      True if CRC validation passed
      int[] positions
      Position counts for all 8 encoders
      short[] velocities
      Velocities for all 8 encoders

      boolean isDataValid()
      Check whether the data is likely valid by verifying the CRC.
